chapter_title.ar: باب حَالَاتِ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام ) فِي السِّنِّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 91 – States of the Imams<sup>asws</sup> regarding the age

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (251/ 4)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (251/ 4)
text: قَالَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ حَسَّانَ لِأَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَا سَيِّدِي إِنَّ النَّاسَ يُنْكِرُونَ عَلَيْكَ حَدَاثَةَ سِنِّكَ فَقَالَ وَ مَا يُنْكِرُونَ مِنْ ذَلِكَ قَوْلَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لَقَدْ قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لِنَبِيِّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) قُلْ هذِهِ سَبِيلِي أَدْعُوا إِلَى اللَّهِ عَلى بَصِيرَةٍ أَنَا وَ مَنِ اتَّبَعَنِي فَوَ اللَّهِ مَا تَبِعَهُ إِلَّا عَلِيٌّ ( عليه السلام ) وَ لَهُ تِسْعُ سِنِينَ وَ أَنَا ابْنُ تِسْعِ سِنِينَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father who said,

‘Ali Bin Hassan said to Abu Ja’farasws, ‘O my Masterasws! The people are denying upon youasws because of your young age’. So heasws said: ‘And what are they denying from that, the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic? Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic Said to Hisazwj Prophetsaww [12:108] Say: This is my way: I call to Allah, I and the one who follows me having insight. So, by Allahazwj, none followed himsaww except for Aliasws, and for himasws were nine years, and Iasws am a boy of nine years old’.
en.sarwar: 8. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father who has said the following. “Once abu Ali ibn Hassa’n spoke to abu Ja‘far (a.s.) saying, “My mater, people refuse to accept your Imamat (Leadership with Divine Authority) because of you very young age.” He said, “Why do they not refuse to accept the words of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most gracious. Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most gracious, has said to His prophet, “ (Muhammad), say, “This is my way. I and all my followers invite you to God with proper understanding.. .” [12:108] By Allah, only Ali (a.s.) followed him at that time and he was only nine years old. I also am nine years old.
